summary: Equity indices near highs with AI/datacenter capex still the dominant leadership theme. Rate path assumed neutral-to-easing. Volatility contained.
implication: Backdrop supports holding/adding high-beta growth, but concentration in the AI trade is itself a fragility — breadth-narrow markets unwind fast.
assumptions: Macro read is analyst judgment as of the data date, not a live market-data fetch.
